nasb.text: You send forth Your Spirit, they are created; And You renew the face of the ground.

esv.text: When you send forth your Spirit, they are created, and you renew the face of the ground.

cnv.text: 你發出你的靈，萬物就被造成； 你也使地面更換一新。

ccb.text: 你一吹气便创造了它们， 你使大地更新。

csbs.text: 你发出你的气息，它们就被造； 你使地面更换一新！
